name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually bland or overly templated slides that feel impersonal and low-effort. Chronicle 2.0 gives teams a way to build compelling, design-forward presentations at speed without sacrificing quality or brand integrity.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks with a distinctive visual identity
Building internal business review presentations quickly
Producing client-facing proposals and project updates
Developing marketing and product launch slide decks
